title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.150 - Who shall preside
text:
172.150.  Who shall preside. — The president, and if he be absent, the vice president, and if both be absent, a curator chosen for the occasion, shall preside at the meetings of the board.
(RSMo 1939 § 10798) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9641; 1919 § 11538; 1909 § 11112
